name: Retry decorator with fixed sleep
task: Create /tmp/eval_retry/retry.py with a decorator retry(retries=3, sleep=0.01, exceptions=(Exception,)) that re-runs the wrapped function up to `retries` extra times, sleeping `sleep` seconds between attempts. Only catch-and-retry exceptions that are instances of `exceptions`; any other exception must propagate immediately without retrying. After all retries are exhausted, re-raise the last matching exception. Use functools.wraps so the wrapper preserves the wrapped function's __name__ and __doc__.
